title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bank of India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bank of India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bank of India! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bank of India:
Bank of India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of India!
